canonical_definition: Benchmark comprising 300 natural-language questions derived from 42 real-world tourism pricing policies, assessing LLMs on customer-type pricing and bundled-tour discount reasoning across three difficulty levels.
papers: Structuring Radiology Reports: ChallengingLLMs with Lightweight Models

definitions.paper: Structuring Radiology Reports: ChallengingLLMs with Lightweight Models
